STOIC: {name} departs without ceremony.
{name} sets out at dawn, as is their way.
RECKLESS: {name} charges headlong towards {target}!
{name} rides out before first light, raring for a fight.
LOYAL: {name} sets out, sworn to return with honour.
{name} departs with the guild's honour in their hands.
CYNICAL: {name} leaves. Probably won't die.
{name} mutters something about coin and heads out.
CHEERFUL: {name} waves cheerfully and sets off!
{name} hums a tune on the road to {target}.
GRIM: {name} departs in silence.
{name} walks out into the grey morning without a word.
CAUTIOUS: {name} double-checks their kit and departs.
{name} takes a final look at the map before heading out.
PROUD: {name} strides out, head held high.
{name} departs with all the bearing of one born for this.

STOIC: The road to {target} passes without incident.
{name} makes steady progress.
RECKLESS: {name} pushes hard, barely pausing to rest.
{name} is already impatient by midday.
LOYAL: {name} keeps a watchful eye throughout the journey.
The road is quiet. {name} is grateful for it.
CYNICAL: Nothing happens. For once.
{name} expected trouble. None came. Suspicious.
CHEERFUL: {name} enjoys the scenery on the way to {target}.
The journey is pleasant. {name} wouldn't have it any other way.
GRIM: Miles pass. {name} says nothing.
The road to {target} is long and silent.
CAUTIOUS: {name} scouts ahead at every bend.
Slow and careful — {name} arrives without incident.
PROUD: {name} attracts a few curious looks on the road.
People step aside for {name}. Good.

STOIC: {name} arrives at {target}.
{name} reaches the destination and surveys the ground.
RECKLESS: {name} arrives at {target} at full gallop.
{name} hits the ground running.
LOYAL: {name} arrives at {target}, ready to see this through.
The destination is in sight. {name} straightens up.
CYNICAL: {name} arrives. It looks worse than expected.
This must be {target}. Charming.
CHEERFUL: {name} arrives at {target} in good spirits!
Here we go. {name} is ready.
GRIM: {name} arrives. The work begins.
There it is. {name} studies the site in silence.
CAUTIOUS: {name} approaches {target} carefully, watching for signs of danger.
{name} arrives and pauses to assess before moving in.
PROUD: {name} arrives at {target}. Time to show what they're made of.
They'll remember this visit.

STOIC: {name} cuts through the opposition efficiently.
A skirmish. {name} handles it without drama.
RECKLESS: {name} throws themselves into the fight with abandon!
Blades and shouting — {name} is in their element.
LOYAL: {name} holds the line, determined not to fail the guild.
They push through together.
CYNICAL: Of course there's a fight. {name} sighs and draws their weapon.
It was always going to come to blows.
CHEERFUL: {name} tackles the skirmish with surprising enthusiasm!
A quick scrap — nothing {name} can't handle.
GRIM: {name} dispatches the enemy with cold efficiency.
More bodies on the road. {name} moves on.
CAUTIOUS: {name} picks their moment carefully and gains the upper hand.
{name} doesn't rush — the skirmish ends on their terms.
PROUD: {name} demonstrates exactly why they were chosen for this.
The enemy learns a hard lesson.

STOIC: {name} is ambushed but holds steady.
An ambush. {name} fights free with controlled precision.
RECKLESS: {name} walks into a trap — and laughs about it.
Ambush! {name} turns it back on them.
LOYAL: {name} doesn't panic. The guild is counting on them.
Caught off guard, but {name} refuses to break.
CYNICAL: They were waiting. Of course they were. {name} adapts.
Nobody told {name} it would be easy. They manage.
CHEERFUL: {name} is caught in an ambush but keeps their wits!
Nasty surprise, but {name} pulls through.
GRIM: {name} anticipated treachery. They were right.
The ambush costs time but not the mission.
CAUTIOUS: {name}'s careful approach gives them just enough warning.
An ambush, but {name} saw the signs in time.
PROUD: {name} refuses to be seen struggling. They push through regardless.
No trap can stop someone of {name}'s calibre.

STOIC: {name} finds a route around the obstacle.
Progress is slowed, but {name} doesn't waver.
RECKLESS: {name} tries to barrel through. Mostly works.
An obstacle. {name} charges it anyway.
LOYAL: {name} pauses, thinks it through, and finds a way.
They didn't come this far to be stopped now.
CYNICAL: Of course there's a complication. {name} deals with it.
Naturally. {name} was expecting this sort of thing.
CHEERFUL: {name} makes the best of a bad situation!
A small setback. Nothing to worry about, says {name}.
GRIM: {name} removes the obstacle. One way or another.
It takes time, but {name} is not easily stopped.
CAUTIOUS: {name} evaluates all options before committing.
A careful detour keeps {name} on track.
PROUD: {name} refuses to be inconvenienced long.
They improvise — flawlessly, naturally.

STOIC: {name} notes something unusual and files it away.
An unexpected find. Useful, perhaps.
RECKLESS: {name} dives in without a second thought.
Curiosity wins out. {name} investigates immediately.
LOYAL: {name} keeps the guild in mind — this could be valuable.
Worth reporting back. {name} makes a note.
CYNICAL: Something worth having, probably cursed. {name} takes it anyway.
Everyone wants something. Including whoever left this here.
CHEERFUL: {name} makes an exciting find!
An unexpected discovery puts a spring in {name}'s step.
GRIM: {name} catalogues what they find and moves on.
A discovery. Could be worse.
CAUTIOUS: {name} examines the find carefully before touching anything.
{name} is thorough. The discovery is noted and secured.
PROUD: {name} claims it, naturally.
Only fitting that someone of {name}'s skill should make such a find.

STOIC: The job is done.
Mission complete. {name} prepares to return.
RECKLESS: Messy, but it worked. {name} grins.
Done! Barely, but done.
LOYAL: {name} sees it through to the end.
The guild won't be disappointed.
CYNICAL: Somehow, it worked. Don't ask {name} how.
Mission complete. Against all reasonable expectation.
CHEERFUL: Success! {name} couldn't be more pleased.
They did it!
GRIM: It's done. {name} turns for home.
Success. No celebration. Just the long road back.
CAUTIOUS: Exactly as planned. {name} permits themselves a small measure of satisfaction.
Careful work pays off.
PROUD: {name} delivers. As expected.
A job worthy of their reputation.

STOIC: The mission fails. {name} withdraws in order.
They couldn't see it through. {name} returns.
RECKLESS: {name} pushes too hard and it falls apart.
Gone wrong. {name} blames bad luck, mostly.
LOYAL: Failure. The weight of it is heavy on {name}.
{name} couldn't do enough. They'll carry this.
CYNICAL: Failed. Didn't see that coming. Well, actually {name} did.
As predicted. More or less.
CHEERFUL: Things don't go as hoped, but {name} keeps their chin up.
A setback. {name} stays positive.
GRIM: It ends in failure. {name} withdraws.
Nothing to show for it.
CAUTIOUS: {name} cuts their losses rather than risk more.
The mission fails, but {name} gets out intact.
PROUD: Failure. {name} is not pleased about this.
This won't go unmentioned. {name} expects to do better.

STOIC: Partial success. Something salvaged from the attempt.
Not all was lost. {name} withdraws with what they have.
RECKLESS: {name} pulls something out of the wreckage.
Half a job. Better than nothing.
LOYAL: Not everything, but enough. {name} returns.
They held the line as long as they could.
CYNICAL: Something, at least. Don't expect gratitude.
A partial success. Which is to say, a partial failure.
CHEERFUL: {name} makes the most of a mixed result!
It wasn't perfect, but {name} found a silver lining.
GRIM: The mission yields some results. Not all.
Partial. {name} has little to say about it.
CAUTIOUS: {name} secures what can be secured and withdraws.
A measured result. Acceptable.
PROUD: {name} is unsatisfied, but returns with something.
Partial success. {name} will demand better of themselves.

STOIC: The mission is a complete success.
Everything achieved. {name} heads home.
RECKLESS: {name} exceeds all expectations — somehow!
Against all odds, a perfect result!
LOYAL: Beyond what was asked. {name} is proud.
The guild could not have asked for more.
CYNICAL: Huh. A full success. Mark the date.
Complete success. {name} tries not to look surprised.
CHEERFUL: Outstanding! {name} is over the moon!
A perfect result — {name} is absolutely beaming.
GRIM: Complete success. {name} allows a quiet exhale.
Everything done. Well done.
CAUTIOUS: {name}'s thorough preparation produces an exceptional outcome.
No detail overlooked. No objective missed.
PROUD: {name} excels. Naturally.
A complete and total success. As it should be.

STOIC: {name} takes a wound but walks away from it.
A minor injury. {name} gives it no more thought than it deserves.
RECKLESS: {name} bleeds a little. Adds character.
A scratch. {name} barely slows down.
LOYAL: {name} is hurt but refuses to show it.
They were lucky. They know it.
CYNICAL: A wound. Of course. {name} expected as much.
{name} catches a blade. Not the first time.
CHEERFUL: Ouch! That stings, laughs {name}.
{name} shrugs off the injury with good humour.
GRIM: {name} is wounded. They've had worse.
It hurts. {name} will live.
CAUTIOUS: {name} is caught off guard — once. It won't happen again.
A minor wound. {name} reassesses their approach.
PROUD: {name} would prefer to deny the injury, but can't.
A wound. {name} refuses to make a fuss.

STOIC: {name} suffers a serious wound and withdraws.
Badly hurt. {name} holds on through gritted teeth.
RECKLESS: {name} went too far this time. Serious injury.
The recklessness finally catches up with {name}.
LOYAL: {name} takes a grievous wound in service to the mission.
Seriously injured. But they didn't break.
CYNICAL: Bad luck. Or bad judgement. Hard to tell with {name}.
{name} is badly hurt. Saw it coming.
CHEERFUL: {name} is seriously injured. Even they can't smile through this one.
The wound is bad. {name} is going to need time.
GRIM: {name} is gravely wounded. Comes with the work.
The injury is serious. {name} doesn't complain.
CAUTIOUS: Despite everything, {name} takes a serious wound.
This one requires time to heal properly. {name} knows it.
PROUD: {name} will not speak of this wound. But it's bad.
Seriously hurt. {name}'s pride takes as much damage as their body.

DEFAULT: {name} falls on the field. The guild mourns.
{name} does not return — at least, not yet.

STOIC: {name} returns.
{name} is back. No fanfare required.
RECKLESS: {name} rides in, grinning like a fool.
{name} returns, somehow intact.
LOYAL: {name} returns as promised.
They're back. The guild breathes easier.
CYNICAL: {name} comes back. Surprised them all.
Returns alive. Barely worth mentioning, says {name}.
CHEERFUL: {name} returns, full of stories!
There they are! {name} is home.
GRIM: {name} returns. Says nothing.
Home. {name} finds a corner and sits.
CAUTIOUS: {name} returns, every piece accounted for.
A careful exit. {name} made it back.
PROUD: {name} returns with their reputation intact.
Home again. {name} accepts the welcome with appropriate dignity.
